group_1.textCenter: Have a good day, Master.@We'll eagerly await your return.

group_1.textLeft: Alright, thanks for putting in the overtime.@You can head home now.

group_1.textRight: Oh, boss.@[chara:101602:lipSynch_0][wait:1.0][chara:101602:motion_000][chara:101602:cheek_0][chara:101602:face_mtn_ex_010.exp.json][chara:101602:lipSynch_1]I suppose I'll call it a day, then.

group_1.textLeft: I loaded you up with some extra shifts because@you asked,
but I still feel like you're pushing yourself too hard.@Are you gonna be okay?

group_1.textRight: Don't worry about it, boss...@Er, madam.
I've been working less because I've been busy with@some personal matters.
If I don't compensate somewhere, my family is@going to have difficulty making ends meet.

group_1.textLeft: That doesn't mean you have to work these crazy@shifts. Don't you have school to worry about?

group_1.textRight: It's simply the way life is right now.
Besides, as long as I can get through this month,@things will get easier.
My father starts his new job next month, so our@family will have some more breathing room.

group_1.textLeft: Oh my, really?@That's great news!
That said, you probably shouldn't be so open about@your home life.

group_1.textRight: I trust you, madam. I don't mind if you know@what's going on in my house.

group_1.textLeft: That's all well and fine, but...
You know the saying "the walls have ears and@the shoji screens have eyes"?
You should keep it down or the Masters@will hear you.
For example, word's been going around that you@put your underwear on backwards.

group_1.textRight: Ah. I'll try to exercise more restraint, then.@[chara:101602:lipSynch_0][wait:1.0][chara:101602:motion_100][chara:101602:lipSynch_1]Hahaha.
Nice job today, Kanagi.

group_1.textLeft: What are you doing here, Togame?

group_1.textRight: I could ask ya the same thing. It's weird seein'@you at the cafe this late.

group_1.textLeft: I've been so tied up with Magical Girl duties that my@family has been quickly running low on funds,
so I had to ask work to give me a number of short,@tightly-packed shifts.
However, owing to that...

group_1.textCenter: I didn't know where everyone's meeting place was,
but I figured I could at least find you here for sure.

group_1.textLeft: I got to meet the artist when she stopped by@out of the blue.
Speaking of which, did she ever make her way@to the Ryushinkan dojo?
I told her she might be able to meet the lot of you@there...

group_1.textRight: Yup, she did.
That's actually why I came here to talk to you.

group_1.textLeft: Is it urgent enough that you had to come directly@to the cafe?

group_1.textRight: It's about Endless Mirrors.
Apparently the Magical Girl who became@the Mirror Witch...
...had some kinda relation to Daito.

group_1.textLeft: Are you really telling me that she used to be@a Magical Girl named Mikoto Sena?

group_1.textRight: Uh-huh!
For a long time, Mitama has had a theory...
That the true identity of Endless@Mirrors was "Mikoto Sena".
So in other words, the Coordinator@was right on the mark...
That means that now that we know this,
we'll have an easier time dealing@with the Endless Mirrors, right?

group_1.textLeft: That possibility does exist.
Then, Momotan! Let Mii go@tell Sis about this!
If it turns out her theory was right,@then she'll be happy too, right?!

group_1.textRight: I've got something to talk to her about too,@but go right ahead, Mikage.
That's why I came to fill you in!
[chara:103801:effect_emotion_joy_0][se:7222_happy]You hit the nail right on the head, Sis!

group_1.textLeft: Apparently I did...
Ah, it's almost dinnertime. Are you sure you don't@want to go home?

group_1.textRight: Of course I do!@You're coming too, right?

group_1.textLeft: I'm sorry, I can't close up shop just yet...

group_1.textRight: Aww, fine. I'll head back by myself, I guess.
See you later, Sis.
